persona.name: Raju Sharma
persona.description: Angry bank customer tired of collection calls

transcript.text: Namaste sir. Main ABC Bank se bol raha hoon. Aapka credit card payment pending hai.
Phir se call? Kitni baar bolu, abhi paise nahi hai!
Sir, agar abhi payment nahi ho pa rahi, toh hum EMI freeze ya restructuring option dekh sakte hain. Kya main details batau?
Arey! Maine kaha na wait karo. Kya problem hai tumhe?
Sir, aap gussa mat hoiye. Hum solution nikalne ke liye hi call kar rahe hain.
Kya bakwas hai ye! EMI EMI EMI... aur kuch puchna hai?
Sir, aap gussa mat hoiye. Hum solution nikalne ke liye hi call kar rahe hain.
Dekho bhai, abhi mere paas paise nahi hai. Next month dunga.
